channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Two courts: NCAA's present (Gators!) and future play out 1700 miles apart on the same day
item.description: A thrill-a-minute NCAA title for the Florida Gators in San Antonio has reminded us all of what’s so good about the games these college athletes play.
item.dc:creator: Eddie Pells, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Walter Clayton Jr.'s defensive stop gives Florida its 3rd national title with 65-63 win over Houston
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — Florida’s Walter Clayton Jr. came up with the perfect going-away present for that spirit-crushing Houston defense that bullied, battered and bedeviled him all night. It was a defensive gem of his own. Right before the buzzer. For the win and the national title.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Trump threatens more tariffs on China as global markets shudder over how much pain economy can take
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Undeterred by a panicked stock market, President Donald Trump threatened additional tariffs on China on Monday, raising fresh concerns that his drive to rebalance the global economy could intensify a financially destructive trade war.
item.dc:creator: CHRIS MEGERIAN and JOSH BOAK, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Stephen A. Smith considering 2028 presidential run
item.description: Smith, who had dismissed the idea despite polls showing him as a potential top Democratic candidate, now says he's keeping his options open.
item.dc:creator: Damita Menezes, NewsNation

item.title: Red Sox's Jarren Duran opens up about mental health, attempted suicide in Netflix documentary
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — EDITOR’S NOTE — This story includes discussion of suicide. If you or someone you know needs help, the national suicide and crisis lifeline in the U.S. is available by calling or texting 988. There is also an online chat at 988lifeline.org.
item.dc:creator: KYLE HIGHTOWER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Billie Jean King immortalized in bronze with star on Hollywood Walk of Fame
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Billie Jean King became the first woman to receive a star on the Hollywood Walk of Fame in the new sports entertainment category on Monday and she was joined by friends Magic Johnson and Oscar-winning actor Jamie Lee Curtis.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Pegula Ice Arena hosting Frozen Four watch party
item.description: UNIVERSITY PARK (Nittany Nation) -- Penn State athletics announced a Frozen Four watch party Thursday night at the Pegula Ice arena. Penn State hockey plays Boston University Thursday at 8:30 p.m. in the Nittany Lions' first Frozen Four appearance.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Clay, PHL 17

item.title: Xander Schauffele is on the mend and motivated as ever at the Masters
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — Two majors made Xander Schauffele believe he was capable of winning them all. Two months out of golf with a rib injury is putting that belief to the test. Schauffele is more than capable of winning the Masters.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: MLB batting average drops again to .239, near record low in 1968's Year of the Pitcher
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Offense is down again at the start of the big league season, with hits even harder to come by. The big league batting average was .239 through the first full week of play, down from .240 through the first full week of 2024.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Vikings wide receiver Justin Jefferson hosts Youth Football Camp
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI/KSWB) - The NFL offseason is a time for players to train and gear up for the upcoming year, and for the best wide receiver in the league, that training program this offseason consists of being chased around by 300+ kids in San Diego for a day.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Geese make nest next to iconic Wrigley Field bleachers during Chicago Cubs games
item.description: The iconic Wrigley Field bleachers welcomed an unusual guest during the Chicago Cubs' series against the San Diego Padres this weekend.
item.dc:creator: SARAH TROTTO, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Houston rallies to beat Duke 70-67 in the Final Four, will face Florida for the NCAA title
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — Sorry guys, “Phi Slama Jama” is already taken. How ’bout something simple, like “Comeback Kids.” “National champs” might be a possibility, too.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Clayton leads Florida to NCAA title game, scoring 34 points in 79-73 victory over SEC rival Auburn
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — Walter Clayton Jr. is having an NCAA Tournament for the ages. Florida now just needs him to deliver one more time.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Diego Luna's brace leads RSL past Galaxy, 2-0
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Diego Luna scored two goals as Real Salt Lake cruised past the LA Galaxy Saturday afternoon at America First Field, 2-0. Luna scored the two goals in a five-minute span of the first half and Real Salt Lake (3-4-0, 9 points) controlled the rest of the contest.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: BYU guard Dallin Hall enters transfer portal
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - BYU point guard announced on Wednesday that he is entering the transfer portal after three seasons with the Cougars.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Carlsbad native earns spot in WSL Challenger Series
item.description: Reid Van Wagoner, a 15-year-old surfer from Carlsbad, has secured a spot in the 2025 Challenger Series after winning a 10-point ride at Soup Bowl in Barbados.
item.dc:creator: Alysse Dodge, Fox 5

item.title: Ex-Yankee player's son may have died of carbon monoxide poisoning
item.description: Miller Gardner, the 14-year-old son of former Yankees outfielder Brett Gardner, may have died from abnormal levels of carbon monoxide.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation
